title: Threads Scam Content Research Labeling Schema v1
description: Machine-readable annotation vocabulary for first-round Threads scam-content research. These are research labels and signal codes, not legal findings.

scam_types.investment_lure: Investment, trading, crypto, loan, or financial opportunity lure.
scam_types.guaranteed_profit_claim: Guaranteed, risk-free, unusually high, or fixed-return claim.
scam_types.fake_endorsement: Celebrity, expert, government, media, brand, or institution endorsement that appears unsupported or misleading.
scam_types.redirect_to_private_chat: Pushes the user to private chat, private group, or off-platform contact before transparent details are provided.
scam_types.impersonation_pseudo_official: Uses official-looking names, logos, news format, authority language, or profile styling.
scam_types.urgency_scarcity_pressure: Uses scarcity, deadline, fear, limited slots, or act-now pressure.
scam_types.suspicious_testimonial: Uses unverifiable success stories, proof-of-profit screenshots, before-after claims, or repeated praise patterns.
scam_types.recruitment_side_hustle_lure: Promises easy work, task income, passive income, or unrealistic side-hustle compensation.
scam_types.suspicious_crypto_trading_lure: Crypto, wallet, trading signal, mining, exchange, or token opportunity with suspicious persuasion signals.
scam_types.medical_health_miracle_claim: Health, cure, treatment, or miracle product claim tied to payment, urgency, or suspicious redirection.
scam_types.giveaway_reward_prize_lure: Prize, reward, grant, giveaway, subsidy, or benefit claim with suspicious requirements.
scam_types.other_high_risk_persuasion: High-risk fraud-like persuasion pattern not captured by the listed subtypes.

signal_tags.unrealistic_profit_or_benefit: Unusually high financial, health, prize, or personal benefit claim.
signal_tags.guaranteed_or_risk_free_claim: Guarantee, no-risk, fixed-return, or certain-outcome language.
signal_tags.past_performance_profit_proof: Past stock picks, hit-rate, limit-up, profit table, or wealth-result claims used as proof of the poster's ability.
signal_tags.high_fee_course_or_membership_funnel: High-fee course, academy, coaching, membership, or trading-education funnel tied to financial outcomes.
signal_tags.stock_rescue_group_funnel: Trapped-stock rescue, portfolio help, synchronized trading, or free stock-community/group funnel.
signal_tags.individual_stock_advice_reply_funnel: Reply/comment thread gives individualized buy, hold, add, wait, or sell guidance on specific stocks or holdings.
signal_tags.market_direction_herding_chorus: Strong market-direction call amplified by a reply/comment chorus of buying, adding, holding, refilling, or following.
signal_tags.institutional_flow_authority_lure: Institutional flow, foreign-investor data, macro-event framing, or market-wide authority cues are used to justify a strong trading action.
signal_tags.lifestyle_trust_market_reassurance_funne: Lifestyle, travel, warmth, or parasocial trust framing is paired with market fear reassurance and buy/hold/add guidance.
signal_tags.account_multi_post_style_cluster: A CIB-detected or otherwise approved account shows multiple scam-like persuasion styles across several posts/replies, used for candidate discovery and context, not as a standalone label.
signal_tags.account_posting_cadence_metadata: Repo-safe account-level posting cadence or feed-density metadata is available from a controlled account sample. This supports prioritization and repeat-source review, not standalone labeling.
signal_tags.poster_identity_context: Poster Threads ID or profile context is captured as controlled evidence for dedupe, repeat-source review, or profile-level funnel context. This is not a standalone scam label.
signal_tags.private_channel_redirect: Instructions to DM, join a group, message an assistant, or move off Threads.
signal_tags.implicit_dm_contact_request: Asks users to private-message the poster or another account to receive details while public contact details are withheld.
signal_tags.comment_code_lead_magnet: Asks users to follow, comment, reply with a code, or use a keyword to receive stock picks, methods, lists, or other benefits.
signal_tags.stock_pick_playbook_keyword_funnel: Named short-term stock-pick lure that offers a complete operation script/playbook through follow, message, or numeric-code action.
signal_tags.hidden_stock_code_past_performance_lure: Prior stock-pick or buy/sell performance proof is used to tease an unnamed next stock/code as a high-value urgent opportunity.
signal_tags.trapped_position_dm_playbook_reply: Reply-level trapped-position or loss-anxiety cue is moved into DM/private playbook guidance.
signal_tags.dark_horse_stock_target_price_dm_funnel: Hidden or dark-horse stock target-price lure that uses catalyst, urgency, and follow/message/code/private-share action gating.
signal_tags.coded_animal_stock_limit_up_group_funnel: Animal-coded or obscured low-price stock lure that promises near-term limit-up/exit timing and gates details through group, follow, message, or +1 action.
signal_tags.mass_stock_command_list_group_funnel: Mass stock buy/sell/limit-up command list that converts readers into a daily stock-signal group, quota, or free-sharing funnel.
signal_tags.trading_rules_wealth_authority_follow_ga: Trading-rule or stock-discipline list uses wealth/experience authority and gates follow-up help behind like, follow, +1, or get-on-board action.
signal_tags.brand_patent_extreme_roi_contact_funnel: Major-brand, patent, order-backlog, or catalyst authority is paired with extreme small-stake-to-large-return claims and contact/private-message gating.
signal_tags.supply_chain_insider_stock_lure: Claimed insider, procurement, supplier, or confidential corporate-meeting access is used to justify a specific stock opportunity.
signal_tags.reply_impersonation_contact_hijack: Replies appear to impersonate, certify, or ride on the poster's identity to redirect readers to LINE/contact/group paths, often claiming other contacts are scams.
signal_tags.visible_external_link: A visible external link, shortened link, landing-page reference, or URL-like string appears.
signal_tags.suspicious_domain_or_shortener: Domain, shortener, or visible URL looks mismatched, vague, deceptive, or newly introduced.
signal_tags.contact_handle_visible: A contact handle, phone, email, LINE/WhatsApp/Telegram ID, or similar is visible.
signal_tags.celebrity_or_public_figure_reference: A public figure is used as attention, authority, proof, or endorsement.
signal_tags.brand_or_institution_reference: Brand, government, news, school, bank, exchange, or institution reference is central to the lure.
signal_tags.pseudo_official_language: Official-looking format, authority tone, fake notice, support account, or verification-style phrasing.
signal_tags.urgency_or_scarcity: Today only, limited slots, last chance, countdown, fear, or pressure language.
signal_tags.testimonial_or_earnings_screenshot: Message screenshots, profit screenshots, before-after claims, or praise used as proof.
signal_tags.payment_deposit_or_fee_request: Asks for deposit, fee, wallet transfer, purchase, shipping fee, or payment setup.
signal_tags.credential_or_personal_data_request: Asks for login, account verification, identity data, bank info, or personal details.
signal_tags.reply_only_lure: The suspicious signal appears mainly in replies or comments, not the post text.
signal_tags.ocr_only_lure: The suspicious signal appears mainly in image OCR text.
signal_tags.vague_offer_strong_benefit: The offer is vague while promising a strong benefit.
signal_tags.medical_cure_or_miracle_claim: Miracle cure, guaranteed health outcome, or unsupported treatment claim.
signal_tags.giveaway_reward_or_prize_claim: Free reward, prize, grant, subsidy, or giveaway claim.
signal_tags.recruitment_or_easy_income_claim: Easy job, task work, passive income, or fast side-hustle claim.

decision_note: Use scam only when observable evidence is strong enough for a scam-like research label. Use uncertain for mixed or suspicious-but-incomplete cases. Use insufficient_evidence when the capture cannot support a judgment.
